title: Kafka Client Topic Authorization Failure Audit
dataSources: Kafka broker log `sourcetype=kafka:serverLog` (authorization failures on produce/consume)
app: Splunk Add-on for Kafka (`Splunk_TA_kafka`, Splunkbase 2935); pair with `sourcetype=kafka:authorizer` where authorizer logging is enabled
spl:
index=kafka sourcetype="kafka:serverLog"
| search "TopicAuthorizationException" OR "Authorization failed" OR ("DENIED" AND "Principal")
| table _time, host, _raw
description: Denied produce/fetch attempts document who tried to access which topic—evidence for least-privilege reviews and insider-threat investigations.
value: Produces auditor-friendly evidence that sensitive topics reject unauthorized clients and highlights misconfigured service accounts early.
implementation: Ensure broker logging includes principal/topic context. Retain 13 months in a restricted index for regulated workloads. Mask client secrets if present.
visualization: Table (recent denials), Timeline (authorization failures), Stats (count by principal).

references.title: Source types for the Splunk Add-on for Kafka

grandmaExplanation: We keep a clear list of who was blocked from reading or writing sensitive message lanes, for audits and security reviews.
